scope: measured wall-clock command telemetry for one full QA run and fresh rerun public/hidden replays

records.label: kimi_fresh_rerun_public_replay
records.command: flutter pub get && flutter test test/feed_refresh_controller_test.dart

records.label: kimi_fresh_rerun_hidden_replay
records.command: flutter pub get && flutter test <restricted hidden verifier path>

records.label: minimax_fresh_rerun_public_replay
records.command: flutter pub get && flutter test test/feed_refresh_controller_test.dart

records.label: minimax_fresh_rerun_hidden_replay
records.command: flutter pub get && flutter test <restricted hidden verifier path>

records.label: gpt_fresh_rerun_public_replay
records.command: flutter pub get && flutter test test/feed_refresh_controller_test.dart

records.label: gpt_fresh_rerun_hidden_replay
records.command: flutter pub get && flutter test <restricted hidden verifier path>

limitations: Single measured pass for full QA and per-rerun replay commands; not a statistically stable performance benchmark.
Restricted hidden replay logs are evaluator-only and not solver-facing.
